name: ListCustomerSubscriptions
description: List all subscriptions for a specific customer. Shows all recurring payment schedules associated with a customer, including active, canceled, and completed subscriptions. Each subscription displays the amount, interval, status, next payment date, and remaining payment count. Useful for customer service inquiries and subscription management interfaces.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer to list subscriptions for (e.g., 'cst_abc123'). This customer must exist in your account.

from_.description: Optional cursor for pagination. Use the 'next' value from a previous list response to retrieve the next page of results.

limit.description: Optional number of subscriptions to return per page (default 50, maximum 250). Use for pagination control.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode subscriptions, or omit for live mode.
